blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
